name: Kuina

effect: [On Play] If you have 2 or less Characters, play up to 1 type or <Slash> attribute Character card with a cost of 4 or less other than [Dracule Mihawk] from your hand rested.

effect: [On Play] ➁ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.)

name: Duval
